indicators.name: several rows of chairs
indicators.rationale: Rows of chairs obstruct the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: large black pillar
indicators.rationale: The large black pillar obstructs the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: carpeted floor
indicators.rationale: Carpeted floors are generally slippery and not suitable for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the presence of multiple rows of chairs and a large black pillar, which obstruct the open floor space required for these activities. The carpeted floor also makes it unsuitable for yoga practice.
